claims.text: On June 28, 2026, Elon Musk announced that Grok 4.5 — based on xAI's 1.5-trillion-parameter V9 foundation model, with supplementary Cursor developer data — was entering private beta at SpaceX and Tesla
Completely trained from scratch new models will be released by @SpaceX every month this year
On June 12, 2026, the US government issued an export control directive ordering Anthropic to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national
Colossus 1 houses more than 220,000 NVIDIA GPUs with approximately 300 MW of power capacity
Anthropic announced a partnership with SpaceX to substantially increase compute capacity
Colossus 2 comprises over 550,000 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs operating at more than 1 gigawatt of power capacity
SpaceX was included in the Department of War's classified-network AI agreements in May 2026
Trump ordered a federal ban on Claude in February 2026 and the Pentagon labeled Anthropic a supply chain risk
A federal judge temporarily blocked the supply-chain designation, writing that the measures appeared designed to punish Anthropic
SpaceX has introduced AI1, the first generation of its AI satellite — an orbital datacenter
Grok 5 is being trained as a 6-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model on Colossus 2
Grok holds approximately 6% enterprise AI adoption versus 55% for OpenAI and 47% for Anthropic
Model weights have no established ECCN classification under the Commerce Control List
Trump signed an AI Executive Order on June 2, 2026 requiring 30-day pre-release government access for cybersecurity review
NSPM-11 requires that fielded AI systems cannot be disabled or materially modified without federal knowledge
